name: D3 Ch12 — Vault of the Drow Wandering Monsters, Open Terrain (1-in-12)
description: Wandering monster table for Open Terrain in the Vault of the Drow, Chapter 12 of D3. Encounter frequency: 1 in 12 per turn. Roll 1d12; on a 1, roll 1d12 on this table. Standard stats: Drow fighter HD 3+3 hp 22 XPV 175; Patrol leader HD 5+5 hp 40 XPV 400; Patrol commander HD 7+7 hp 56 XPV 850. Mixed patrol non-drow troops: roll 1d4 (1=bugbears 4-8, 2=quaggoths 3-6, 3=trolls 1-2, 4=hook horrors 2-4).

results.text: Drow patrol, male (7–10 fighters HD 3+3 hp 22, 1 patrol leader HD 5+5 hp 40, 1 patrol commander HD 7+7 hp 56; XPV 175/400/850)
Drow patrol, female (7–10 fighters HD 3+3 hp 22, 1 patrol leader HD 5+5 hp 40, 1 patrol commander — Level 6 cleric with full spells; XPV 175/400/850+)
Drow patrol, mixed (2 male fighters, 1 male patrol leader + non-drow troops; roll 1d4: 1=bugbears 4–8, 2=quaggoths 3–6, 3=trolls 1–2, 4=hook horrors 2–4)
Bugbears (13–18) with slave coffle (19–24 mixed humanoids; HD 3+1, hp 18, AC 5, Dmg 2–8; XPV 135 each)
Quaggoths (4–7; HD 3+3, hp 22, AC 5, #AT 2, Dmg 2–8/2–8; XPV 100 each)
Trolls (1–4; HD 6+6, hp 50, AC 4, #AT 3, Dmg 5–8/5–8/2–12, regenerate; XPV 749 each)
Hook horrors (2–8; HD 5, hp 40, AC 3, #AT 2, Dmg 3–8/3–8; XPV 320 each)
Drow merchant train — roll 1d3: 1=small train (1–2 merchants, 2 fighters, 1 leader, 4 bugbear guards, 5–8 slave bearers, 1–2 pack lizards), 2=medium, 3=large
Giant spiders (2–5; HD 4+4, hp 32, AC 4, SA poison; XPV 245 each)
Troglodytes (7–12; HD 2, hp 12, SA stench; XPV 28 each) and trolls (1–2; HD 6+6, hp 50; XPV 749 each)
Gargoyles (3–12; HD 4, hp 28, AC 5, #AT 4, Dmg 1–3/1–3/1–6/1–4; XPV 195 each)
Purple worm (1; HD 15, hp 100+, AC 6, Dmg 2–24 + swallow whole; XPV 7,600)
